title: Debug Stick Usage
description: A 1.21 neoforge mod that allows you to craft and use the debug stick in survival mod.
body:
A 1.21 neoforge mod that allows you to craft and use debug stick in survival mod.
The left click property-choosing operation has been improved in survival mode so that you don't need to mine the block with your bare hands to choose which property you want to debug.
There is also a configurable ban (allowed by default) on debugging the number of turtle eggs in survival mode. You can modify this configuration through the config file. More configurable blacklists might be added in the future.
